chat_contacts_owner_xor.name: chat_contacts_owner_xor
chat_contacts_owner_xor.value: (("chat_contacts"."user_id" IS NOT NULL)::int + ("chat_contacts"."carrier_id" IS NOT NULL)::int) = 1

voice_trunks_auth_userpass_complete.name: voice_trunks_auth_userpass_complete
voice_trunks_auth_userpass_complete.value: "voice_trunks"."auth_type" NOT IN ('userpass','both') OR ("voice_trunks"."username" IS NOT NULL AND "voice_trunks"."password_encrypted" IS NOT NULL)

voice_trunks_auth_ip_complete.name: voice_trunks_auth_ip_complete
voice_trunks_auth_ip_complete.value: "voice_trunks"."auth_type" NOT IN ('ip','both') OR ("voice_trunks"."ip_acl" IS NOT NULL AND jsonb_array_length("voice_trunks"."ip_acl") > 0)
